summary: The diff shows modifications to frontend files (App.tsx, index.css, tailwind.config.js, frontend-file-summaries.txt, project_state.json) that appear to fix CSS/styling issues (OKLCH color token format) and routing configuration. However, there is no evidence of backend Motoko actor changes, no dfx.json or canister configuration changes, and no deployment scripts or CI configuration changes. The project_state.json still marks the feature as 'pending', suggesting deployment has not been completed. The diff does not demonstrate that the backend canister was deployed or that the frontend was built and deployed successfully.

missing_requirements.requirement: Retry the full build and deployment of the AyurGlow Secrets application, including the backend Motoko actor and the React frontend, resolving any errors that caused the previous deployment to fail.
missing_requirements.reason: There is no evidence of backend Motoko actor files being modified or deployed. No dfx.json, canister Motoko source files, or deployment configuration files are present in the diff. The project_state.json still shows the feature as 'pending' status, indicating deployment was not completed. The acceptance criteria requiring successful backend canister deployment and confirmed frontend deployment cannot be verified from the diff.
